testcase.name: Shree User Login Tests › should login Shree user successfully
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] 11:45:55 AM - Navigating to Shree login page [INFO] 11:46:00 AM - Attempting to login with mobile: 9011409986 [INFO] 11:46:00 AM - Filling Mobile field with value [INFO] 11:46:06 AM - Filling Password field with value [INFO] 11:46:06 AM - Clicking on Sign In button [INFO] 11:46:07 AM - Login initiated [INFO] 11:46:10 AM - Shree user login successful

testcase.name: Shree User Login Tests › should display dashboard after Shree user login
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] 11:45:55 AM - Navigating to Shree login page [INFO] 11:46:00 AM - Attempting to login with mobile: 9011409986 [INFO] 11:46:00 AM - Filling Mobile field with value [INFO] 11:46:08 AM - Filling Password field with value [INFO] 11:46:08 AM - Clicking on Sign In button [INFO] 11:46:09 AM - Login initiated [INFO] 11:46:14 AM - Verifying dashboard title: Ess Dashboard [INFO] 11:46:18 AM - Dashboard title verified for Shree user
